purpose: PI direction: use the broadened Reactome layer as a DISCOVERY / RESCUE-CONNECTION substrate for NB7, not as a redundant co-equal of KEGG. This snapshot preserves REACTION and SUB-PATHWAY structure (not just a flat gene list) so a downstream notebook can cite the specific reaction or sub-pathway a rescued locus connects through.
